title: Striatal Synaptosome Imaging and Analysis
author: Chuyu Chen
materials: Incubation with primary antibodies (VAMP2 1:200, R&D; TH 1:500, SYSY; bassoon 1:300, Enzo) in 0.1% Triton X-100, 1% donkey serum PBS overnight at 4°C.

Incubation with secondary antibodies (Donkey anti-Rabbit Alexa Fluor‱ 488; Donkey anti-goat Alexa Fluor‱ 647,; Cy‱3 AffiniPure‱ Donkey Anti-Guinea Pig) in 0.1% Triton X-100, 1% donkey serum PBS, 90 min RT
homogenizing buffer recipe( 4mM HEPES, 320mM Sucrose and Halt protease supplemented with phosphatase inhibitor cocktail (Thermo Fisher Scientific))

steps.title: Homogenized brain extract centrifuge at 1000...
steps.instruction: Homogenized brain extract centrifuge at 1000 g for 10 min at 4℃.

steps.title: Remove supernatant (S2)
steps.instruction: Remove supernatant (S2). re-homogenized pellet (P2) in 1 ml homogenizing buffer with 10 strokes in a Teflon homogenizer.

steps.title: Add P2 homogenate to the top...
steps.instruction: Add P2 homogenate to the top of a sucrose gradient made of 5ml 1.2M sucrose and 5ml 0.8M sucrose, and centrifuge at 69,150 g (SW41) for 70 min at 4°C.

steps.title: The synaptic plasma membrane fraction (SPM)...
steps.instruction: The synaptic plasma membrane fraction (SPM) in the interphase between two sucrose fractions was collected using a syringe and transferred to clean tubes.

steps.title: Synaptosomes were diluted 5000 times in 1xPBS, add on #1
steps.instruction: Synaptosomes were diluted 5000 times in 1xPBS, add on #1.5 poly-d-lysine coated coverslips

steps.title: Synaptosomes on coverslips are incubated in...
steps.instruction: Synaptosomes on coverslips are incubated in 5% donkey serum in PBS 1 hour

steps.title: washes in 1X PBS, 5 mins x 3
steps.instruction: washes in 1X PBS, 5 mins x 3

steps.title: mounted using ProLong‱ Diamond Antifade Mountant
steps.instruction: mounted using ProLong‱ Diamond Antifade Mountant

steps.title: Images are acquired with the confocal...
steps.instruction: Images are acquired with the confocal Nikon A1 laser scanning microscope system using a 100X 1.49NA objective.

steps.title: To identify VAMP2 containing synaptosomes that...
steps.instruction: To identify VAMP2 containing synaptosomes that are also positive for TH, the intensity of TH signal was measured within VAMP2 positive ROIs. The intensity of the protein of interest signal (e.g. BSN, RIM) was measured in the double-positive ROIs to keep only the triple-positive ROIs and the mean intensity value of the protein of interest was calculated and plotted.

steps.title: a ROI is considered to contain...
steps.instruction: a ROI is considered to contain the target protein when the average fluoresce intensity of that protein within the ROI is more than 2 times the average intensity of all pixels in the image and is considered as not containing the target protein when the intensity of the target protein within the ROI is below 2 times the average intensity of all pixels.

steps.title: Automatic segmentation (threshold
steps.instruction: Automatic segmentation (threshold: default; analyze particles: size 0.04-0.40; circularity: 0.30-1.00) to define ROIs in VAMP2 channel.

steps.title: Automatic segmentation was used to define...
steps.instruction: Automatic segmentation was used to define the ROIs set both for BSN and TH (threshold: default; analyze particles: size 0.04-0.40 for BSN and size 0,06-0,60 for TH; circularity: 0.30-1.00).

steps.title: Exploiting the“AND” function with BSN and...
steps.instruction: Exploiting the“AND” function with BSN and TH ROIs in the ROI Manager.

steps.title: The intensity of VAMP2 signal was...
steps.instruction: The intensity of VAMP2 signal was used to define the BSN-TH overlapped ROIs positive for VAMP2.

steps.title: Determine average area value of BSN...
steps.instruction: Determine average area value of BSN localized within TH and VAMP2 positive synaptosomes using the “set measurement” and “mesure” ImageJ functions.

steps.title: Automatic segmentation define ROIs in TH channel (threshold
steps.instruction: Automatic segmentation define ROIs in TH channel (threshold: default; size 0,06-0,60; circularity: 0.30-1.00).

steps.title: Measure the intensity signal of VAMP2...
steps.instruction: Measure the intensity signal of VAMP2 within TH ROIs to define TH ROIs positive for VAMP2

steps.title: Obtain the triple positive by measure...
steps.instruction: Obtain the triple positive by measure BSN intensity within the double positive ROIs

steps.title: Automatic segmentation to define the total...
steps.instruction: Automatic segmentation to define the total number of ROIs in BSN channel (threshold: default; size 0,04-0,40; circularity: 0.30-1.00).

steps.title: the % of BSN positive synaptosome...
steps.instruction: the % of BSN positive synaptosome localizing with VAMP2 and TH double positive synaptosomes was calculated with excel

steps.title: The supernatant (S1) centrifuge at 12,500...
steps.instruction: The supernatant (S1) centrifuge at 12,500 g for 15 min at 4°C.

steps.title: mouse striata were dissected and rapidly...
steps.instruction: mouse striata were dissected and rapidly homogenized in 1ml iced-cold homogenizing buffer using a Teflon homogenizer (15 strokes).

steps.title: spun down at 4000 rmp for 10 min at 4°C
steps.instruction: spun down at 4000 rmp for 10 min at 4°C

steps.title: Synaptosomes on coverslips are incubated in 0
steps.instruction: Synaptosomes on coverslips are incubated in 0.5% Triton X-100 in PBS 10 minutes.

description: Regarding intensity analysis, background was subtracted from all channels using the “rolling ball” ImageJ plugin with a radius of 33.0 pixels.
